title: SCP-001, When Day Breaks
description: Can you survive the day when the sun burns everything alive, turning them into Monsters?
body:
When Day Breaks adds a terrifying new Event. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-001, also known as When Day Breaks.


During the night, a warning will signal that SCP-001 will activate the following morning. As SCP-001 becomes active, every mob exposed to sunlight will begin to melt, dying instantly from the Melting Effect. These melted mobs turn into Sludges, creatures that can fuse together to create even larger and more dangerous Sludges. As night falls, SCP-001 active event ends. SCP-001 can be made permanent, leaving the day in a constant state of danger. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Can I make SCP-001 permanent?

Yes! SCP-001 event can be made permanent by setting the gamerule "permanentWhenDayBreaks" to true. To do this, the event must already be active.

► How to turn on/off the event?

SCP-001 is naturally triggered by a Trigger Entity during the night. When it's daytime, the event starts and when it becomes night, the event ends. However, SCP-001 is rarely triggered, but can also be influenced by the number of other mods.

Alternatively, you can trigger the event by setting the gamerule "allowsWarning" to false and the gamerule "whenDayBreaksActive" to true.

To stop the event, you can set the gamerule "allowsWarning" to true and the gamerule "whenDayBreaksActive" to false.

</details>



![When Day Breaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04899488c567f147435f9643b614aacbc33fa8ff.png)

SCP-001 can be triggered during the night. A warning message will appear, and the next day, SCP-001 becomes active. Any entities exposed to direct sunlight during SCP-001 will receive the Melting Effect. This effect causes rapid damage to mobs, killing them quickly, and it also has a visual effect. However, entities hidden under blocks are safe. SCP-001 deactivates at night, and a clearance message will appear. When a mob dies from the Melting Effect during SCP-001, it transforms into a Sludge.
 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
